preconditions: User can access the login page URL

testCases.title: Verify login page loads successfully
testCases.expectedResult: Login page loads successfully with username field, password field, and login button visible

testCases.title: Login with valid username and valid password
steps: Enter username haklarr in the username field
Enter password Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the application dashboard or landing page

testCases.title: Verify login failure with incorrect username and valid password
steps: Enter username invaliduser in the username field
Enter password Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login is rejected and an error message indicating invalid username or password is displayed

testCases.title: Verify login failure with valid username and incorrect password
steps: Enter username haklarr in the username field
Enter password WrongPass123 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login is rejected and an error message indicating invalid username or password is displayed

testCases.title: Verify login failure with both username and password incorrect
steps: Enter username wronguser in the username field
Enter password wrongpassword in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and an error message indicating invalid username or password is displayed

testCases.title: Verify login failure when username and password fields are blank
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and validation or error message is displayed indicating username and password cannot be blank

testCases.title: Verify login failure when username is blank and password is entered
steps: Enter password Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and a validation or error message indicates that username is required

testCases.title: Verify login failure when password is blank and username is entered
steps: Enter username haklarr in the username field
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and a validation or error message indicates that password is required

testCases.title: Verify username field accepts leading and trailing spaces
steps: Enter username with leading and trailing spaces around haklarr
testCases.expectedResult: System trims unnecessary spaces or rejects login appropriately without system error

testCases.title: Verify password field with leading and trailing spaces
steps: Enter password with leading and trailing spaces around Icstunnel1
testCases.expectedResult: System processes input correctly and either trims spaces or rejects login without system failure

testCases.title: Verify login behavior with very long username input
steps: Enter a username with more than 256 characters
testCases.expectedResult: System handles the input safely and displays validation or login failure without UI or server crash

testCases.title: Verify login behavior with very long password input
steps: Enter a password longer than 256 characters
testCases.expectedResult: System handles long input safely and login fails without application error

testCases.title: Verify username field with special characters
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and system displays appropriate error without crashing or exposing sensitive information

testCases.title: Verify password field accepts special characters
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails or processes correctly without UI or backend errors

testCases.title: Verify case sensitivity of username
testCases.expectedResult: System enforces username case rules and either authenticates correctly or rejects login with proper error message

testCases.title: Verify case sensitivity of password
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails because password is case sensitive and an error message is displayed

testCases.title: Verify login submission using keyboard Enter key
testCases.expectedResult: Login form submits successfully and user is authenticated

testCases.title: Verify behavior when Login button is clicked multiple times quickly
steps: Rapidly click the Login button multiple times
testCases.expectedResult: System processes only one authentication request and prevents duplicate submissions or UI errors
